providerKeyForm.mistralHint: Mistral (🇫🇷) also powers search across your documents — it's the best place to start.
providerKeyForm.encryptionNote: Encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage, decrypted only at the moment of the call, server-side. It never leaves your instance.
